godotApiContract.rationale: Only explicitly listed UI, window and platform service member families are approved; every other Godot DisplayServer member remains deferred until a separate owner decision.

memberDecisions.rationale: Accessibility services belong to the approved Electron2D UI platform boundary.
Clipboard access belongs to the approved desktop/editor UI boundary.
Native global menu integration belongs to the approved desktop/editor UI boundary.
The display safe area belongs to the approved 2D UI platform boundary.
Screen information and supported display configuration belong to the public platform subset.
Text-to-speech belongs to the approved accessibility boundary.
Virtual keyboard integration belongs to the approved 2D UI/input boundary.
Window lifecycle and supported window operations belong to the public desktop/editor boundary.

electronApiContract.rationale: Every currently exported DisplayServer member must map to an explicitly approved Godot DisplayServer member.

godotApiContract.rationale: Only canvas, 2D texture, HLSL material/shader and canvas-attached viewport operations are eligible; all spatial, 3D, RD, GI, sky, fog and concrete backend members are unsupported by default.

memberDecisions.rationale: Godot canvas and canvas-item families map to the Electron2D 2D rendering boundary.
Texture2D operations belong to the public 2D rendering boundary.
Material operations are approved only for canvas-compatible Electron2D materials.
Shader operations are approved only through the public HLSL 2D shader contract.
Only canvas attachment and canvas transform viewport operations belong to the 2D subset.
MSAA configuration is approved only for the 2D viewport path.

godotApiContract.rationale: Every Godot Shader.Mode value has an explicit Electron2D decision; no omitted enum value is implicitly approved.

enumValueDecisions.name: MODE_CANVAS_ITEM
enumValueDecisions.rationale: Canvas-item HLSL shaders are the primary Electron2D shader path.

enumValueDecisions.name: MODE_FOG
enumValueDecisions.rationale: Volumetric fog is outside the Electron2D 2D rendering contract.

enumValueDecisions.name: MODE_PARTICLES
enumValueDecisions.rationale: Particles mode supports the approved GPUParticles2D process-shader path without enabling GPUParticles3D.

enumValueDecisions.name: MODE_SKY
enumValueDecisions.rationale: Sky shaders are part of the forbidden 3D environment pipeline.

enumValueDecisions.name: MODE_SPATIAL
enumValueDecisions.rationale: Spatial shaders are part of the forbidden 3D rendering pipeline.

enumValueDecisions.name: MODE_TEXTURE_BLIT
enumValueDecisions.rationale: Texture blit mode supports the approved DrawableTexture2D runtime drawing path.

electronApiContract.rationale: Every currently exported Shader.Mode value must map to an explicitly approved Godot enum value.

memberDecisions.name: CanvasItem
memberDecisions.rationale: Electron2D CanvasItem maps to the approved Godot Shader.Mode canvas-item value.

Project-owner approved TextureRect for the 0.1-preview public API profile as the requested texture rectangle UI control; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the TextureRect public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved TextureRect.ExpandMode for the 0.1-preview public API profile as the exported nested expand enum owned by the approved TextureRect UI contract; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the TextureRect public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved TextureRect.StretchMode for the 0.1-preview public API profile as the exported nested stretch enum owned by the approved TextureRect UI contract; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the TextureRect public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved Theme for the 0.1-preview public API profile as the UI theming resource required by Control and Window; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the Theme public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved ThemeDB for the Electron2D 0.1-preview public API profile as the Theme/Control fallback fonts, icons and styles registry; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the ThemeDB public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved Thread for the Electron2D 0.1-preview public API profile as a threading primitive needed by editor, importers, async loading and background jobs; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the Thread public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved TileData for the Electron2D 0.1-preview public API profile because TileMap, TileMapLayer and TileSet require tile metadata at runtime/editor time; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the TileData public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved TileMap for the 0.1-preview public API profile as the requested tile map node; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the TileMap public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved TileMapLayer for the 0.1-preview public API profile as the requested tile map layer node; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the TileMapLayer public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved TileMapPattern for the 0.1-preview public API profile as part of the 2D tilemap API; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the TileMapPattern public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved TileSet for the 0.1-preview public API profile as the core 2D tilemap resource; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the TileSet public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved TileSetAtlasSource for the 0.1-preview public API profile as the atlas-backed 2D tileset source; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the TileSetAtlasSource public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved TileSetScenesCollectionSource for the 0.1-preview public API profile as the scene-collection 2D tileset source; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the TileSetScenesCollectionSource public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved TileSetSource for the 0.1-preview public API profile as the base 2D tileset source contract; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the TileSetSource public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved Time for the Electron2D 0.1-preview public API profile as a base runtime utility for clocks, timestamps and date/time conversion; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the Time public class task before acceptance.
Project-owner approved Timer for the 0.1-preview public API profile as the requested timer node; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the Timer public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved TLSOptions for the Electron2D 0.1-preview public API profile as the TLS configuration resource used by public HTTP, socket, stream and DTLS networking APIs; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the TLSOptions public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved ToolAttribute for the 0.1-preview public API profile as the C# metadata attribute used by Electron2D editor/tool script workflows; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the scripting metadata public API task before acceptance.
Project-owner explicitly forbids TorusMesh in the Electron2D public API profile because PrimitiveMesh/3D mesh geometry is outside the Electron2D 2D public API scope.

Project-owner approved TouchScreenButton for the 0.1-preview public API profile as the requested touchscreen button node; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the TouchScreenButton public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved Transform2D as the 2D transform value type for canvas, nodes, UI/editor geometry, resources, serialization and Variant-compatible data flow; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the Transform2D public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner explicitly forbids Transform3D in the Electron2D public API profile because it is 3D/spatial transform math; Electron2D uses Transform2D for 2D transforms and does not approve Node3D, 3D scenes or 3D mesh pipeline.

Project-owner approved Translation for the 0.1-preview public API profile as the base localization resource used with OptimizedTranslation and i18n; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the Translation public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved TranslationDomain for the Electron2D 0.1-preview public API profile as part of the i18n layer with Translation and OptimizedTranslation; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the TranslationDomain public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved TranslationServer for the Electron2D 0.1-preview public API profile as the i18n singleton/service with Translation and OptimizedTranslation; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the TranslationServer public class task before acceptance.
Project-owner approved Tree for the 0.1-preview public API profile as the requested tree control; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the Tree public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved Tree.SelectMode for the 0.1-preview public API profile as the exported nested selection enum owned by the approved Tree UI contract; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the Tree public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved TreeItem for the Electron2D 0.1-preview public API profile because Tree UI requires item objects; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the TreeItem public class task before acceptance.
Project-owner explicitly forbids TriangleMesh in the Electron2D public API profile because it belongs to the mesh/geometry pipeline with 3D/ArrayMesh semantics.
Project-owner explicitly forbids TubeTrailMesh in the Electron2D public API profile because trail mesh resources belong to the Godot 3D mesh pipeline, not the Electron2D 2D public API.

Project-owner approved Tween for the Electron2D 0.1-preview public API profile as the public tweening runtime API; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the Tween public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved Tween.EaseType for the 0.1-preview public API profile as the exported nested easing enum owned by the approved Tween/Tweener contract; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the Tween public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved Tween.TransitionType for the 0.1-preview public API profile as the exported nested transition enum owned by the approved Tween/Tweener contract; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the Tween public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved Tweener for the Electron2D 0.1-preview public API profile as the base public tween step contract; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the Tweener public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner explicitly forbids TwoBoneIK3D in the Electron2D engine public API profile because 3D, XR/OpenXR, CSG, volumetric, 3D physics, 3D navigation and 3D rendering surfaces are outside the Electron2D 0.1-preview public API scope.

Project-owner approved UDPServer for the Electron2D 0.1-preview public API profile as the UDP server in the public networking layer; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the UDPServer public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved UDSServer for the Electron2D 0.1-preview public API profile as a platform-gated Unix domain socket/local IPC server; implementation must expose supported platforms clearly and remain outside core gameplay assumptions.

Project-owner approved UndoRedo for the Electron2D 0.1-preview public API profile because the Electron2D editor is written on Electron2D and editor tools/plugins need undo/redo transactions; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the UndoRedo public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner explicitly forbids UniformSetCacheRD in the Electron2D public API profile because RD/RenderingDevice cache and low-level renderer internals are not public in the HLSL-only 2D shader path.

Project-owner approved UPNP for the Electron2D 0.1-preview public API profile as the opt-in NAT traversal networking module for multiplayer; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the UPNP public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved UPNPDevice for the Electron2D 0.1-preview public API profile as the opt-in NAT traversal device object used by UPNP; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the UPNPDevice public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved Variant as core Electron2D runtime API for properties, signals, inspector/editor UI, serialization, reflection, scene/resource loading and Variant-compatible data flow; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the Variant public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved Variant.Type for the 0.1-preview public API profile as the exported nested Variant storage-kind enum owned by the approved Variant runtime contract; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the Variant public class task before acceptance.
Project-owner approved VBoxContainer for the 0.1-preview public API profile as the vertical box layout ancestor required by ColorPicker.

Project-owner approved Vector2 as a 2D/UI/editor/resource/runtime numeric value type for canvas, physics, input, serialization and Variant-compatible data flow; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the Vector2 public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved Vector2I as the C# public name for Godot Vector2i: a 2D/UI/editor/resource/runtime integer vector value type; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the Vector2I public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved Vector3 only as a data-only numeric/HLSL/editor-compatible value type for uniforms, buffers, colors/XYZ and procedural data; this does not approve Node3D, Transform3D, 3D scenes, 3D mesh pipeline or VisualShader.

Project-owner approved Vector3I as the C# public name for Godot Vector3i only as a data-only numeric/HLSL/editor-compatible integer value type; this does not approve Node3D, Transform3D, 3D scenes, 3D mesh pipeline or VisualShader.

Project-owner approved Vector4 only as a data-only numeric/HLSL/editor-compatible value type for uniforms, buffers, colors/XYZW and procedural data; this does not approve 3D transforms, projection/spatial math, 3D scenes, 3D mesh pipeline or VisualShader.

Project-owner approved Vector4I as the C# public name for Godot Vector4i only as a data-only numeric/HLSL/editor-compatible integer value type; this does not approve 3D transforms, projection/spatial math, 3D scenes, 3D mesh pipeline or VisualShader.

Project-owner explicitly forbids VehicleBody3D in the Electron2D engine public API profile because 3D, XR/OpenXR, CSG, volumetric, 3D physics, 3D navigation and 3D rendering surfaces are outside the Electron2D 0.1-preview public API scope.

Project-owner explicitly forbids VehicleWheel3D in the Electron2D engine public API profile because 3D, XR/OpenXR, CSG, volumetric, 3D physics, 3D navigation and 3D rendering surfaces are outside the Electron2D 0.1-preview public API scope.

Project-owner approved VerticalAlignment for the 0.1-preview public API profile as a global UI/text alignment enum used by Label, text and Control-facing APIs; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the UI/text public API task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved VFlowContainer for the 0.1-preview public API profile as the requested vertical flow UI container; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the VFlowContainer public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved VideoStream for the 0.1-preview public API profile because VideoStreamPlayer is already in scope and needs a public video stream resource; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the VideoStream public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner deferred VideoStreamPlayback from the first public user-facing API surface because it is an internal playback state for VideoStream; expose it only if custom video decoders or user-extensible playback states are explicitly brought into scope.

Project-owner approved VideoStreamPlayer for the 0.1-preview public API profile as the requested video stream player control; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the VideoStreamPlayer public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved VideoStreamTheora for the 0.1-preview public API profile because VideoStreamPlayer is already in scope and Theora is the Godot-compatible built-in video stream resource; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the VideoStreamTheora public class task before acceptance.
Project-owner approved Viewport for 0.1-preview as the view and presentation boundary in approved public API ancestor chains and scene rendering API.

Project-owner approved ViewportTexture for the 0.1-preview public API profile as the Texture2D resource produced by Viewport and SubViewport; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the ViewportTexture public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved VirtualJoystick for the 0.1-preview public API profile as the requested virtual joystick control; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the VirtualJoystick public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner approved VisibleOnScreenEnabler2D for the 0.1-preview public API profile as the requested 2D visible-on-screen enabler node; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the VisibleOnScreenEnabler2D public class task before acceptance.

Project-owner explicitly forbids VisibleOnScreenEnabler3D in the Electron2D engine public API profile because 3D, XR/OpenXR, CSG, volumetric, 3D physics, 3D navigation and 3D rendering surfaces are outside the Electron2D 0.1-preview public API scope.

Project-owner approved VisibleOnScreenNotifier2D for the 0.1-preview public API profile as the requested 2D visible-on-screen notifier node; implementation and parity evidence remain owned by the VisibleOnScreenNotifier2D public class task before acceptance.
